name: essentials
description: Skill development tools, wiki maintenance with knowledge pipeline (ingest, query, lint, reduce, reflect, reweave), deep-research investigation pipeline, chief-of-staff second-brain orchestrator (daily/weekly/review/update cadences), scaffold-project skill for bootstrapping repos from templates, ideation-loop skill for moving from fuzzy intent to locked decisions (decision-sheet format, stop rule, hiring-lens filter), and web research agent for enhanced development workflow
